name: Meat Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a casserole dish using non-stick pan spray (standard).
3. Combine all ingredients in the prepared casserole dish.
4. Bake for 2 hours and 15 minutes. Suitable for 8 servings.
5. Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 3 MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
